WoofWatch

JD Gardner

Description

WoofWatch is a high-energy action roguelite where mech-suited dogs battle through a constantly changing Pastel City. Dodge, reload, and unleash chaos with outrageous weapons and gear, from heavy artillery to rubber duck launchers.

Long ago, dogs were sent to Earth as sleeper agents. Now, a rogue AI called S.A.M. has broken loose, and it's up to WoofWatch to fight back. Unlock new agents, adapt on the fly, and take on bosses inspired by the things dogs fear most. Sit! Stay! Save the day!

Features

  • Wild, procedurally generated weapons and armor combos that transform every run.
  • Play as a roster of mech-suited WoofWatch agents, each with unique abilities.
  • Fast, responsive twin-stick combat with dodge-rolls, guns, melee, grenades, and powerful super abilities.
  • Fight through randomized districts of Pastel City, each packed with unique enemies, bosses, and loot.

Development

JD Gardner is an independent developer.
Music by Hydraa, Kinda Rad, and RoBKTA.
Capsule art by Molly Stanard.
